# Memory/RAG Backend

This repository contains the databases and logic for RAG and other memory systems for Project-Hermes

## Current Specifications

Currently this uses the following...

**Vector Database:** ChromaDB
**Embedding Model:** all-MiniLM-L6-v2

**

## ChromaDB

## Anaconda requirements.txt

```bash
pip list --format=freeze > requirements.txt
```

When installing via Anaconda, make sure to install `chromadb` via `pip` and NOT Anaconda's package manager. Otherwise it will return pydantic errors.

```bash
pip install chromadb
```
